name: tavily
description: Web search, content extraction, site crawling, and URL mapping built for AI agents via the Tavily API

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search the web and get ranked results with optional LLM answer

search_depth.description: Depth vs latency tradeoff: basic, advanced, fast, or ultra-fast

include_answer.description: Include an LLM-generated answer to the query

time_range.description: Filter by publish date: day, week, month, or year

historicalSummary.omitted: raw page content and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Extract
tools.description: Extract clean page content from one or more URLs

urls.description: URLs to extract content from, e.g. ["https://example.com"]

extract_depth.description: Extraction depth: basic or advanced (advanced costs more)

tools.name: Crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website from a root URL and extract content from discovered pages

url.description: Root URL to begin the crawl

instructions.description: Natural language directions for targeted crawling, e.g. 'find all pricing pages'

max_depth.description: How far from the root URL the crawler explores (max 5)

limit.description: Total number of links processed before stopping

tools.name: Map
tools.description: Get a list of URLs discovered on a website without extracting content

max_depth.description: How far from the root URL the mapper explores

limit.description: Total number of links processed before stopping

prompts.title: Search the web
prompts.prompt: Search the web with Tavily for a query I provide and summarize the top results.

prompts.title: Extract a page
prompts.prompt: Extract the content of a URL I provide with Tavily and summarize it.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Tavily API Setup

steps.title: Create a Tavily account
steps.description: Go to https://app.tavily.com and sign up — the free plan includes monthly API credits, enough for testing.

steps.title: Copy your API key
steps.description: Your default API key is shown on the dashboard home (https://app.tavily.com/home); create additional keys per project if needed.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as TAVILY_API_KEY=tvly-...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Search tool with a simple query. A 401 means the key is invalid; a 432 means you exceeded your plan limit.

notes: All endpoints consume API credits per request; advanced search/extract depth costs more than basic
Crawl runs synchronously and can take a while on large sites — keep max_depth and limit small
